<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>BSSM RE:ACT</title>
<style>
  @font-face {
    font-family: 'Giants';
    src: url('data:font/truetype;base64,') format('truetype');
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; background: #fff; color: #111; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }

  .logo-wrap { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .react-logo { font-family: 'Giants', sans-serif; font-size: 96px; letter-spacing: 6px; line-height: 1.1; color: #111; }

  .wave-banner { width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .wave-banner svg { display: block; width: 100%; }

  .section { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .section h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }

  .info-list { list-style: none; font-size: 14px; line-height: 2; }
  .info-list li span { font-weight: 600; margin-right: 6px; }

  table.tech { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 13px; }
  table.tech td { padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; vertical-align: middle; }
  table.tech td:first-child { font-weight: 600; width: 110px; background: #f9f9f9; }
  .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: #f3f4f6; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 6px; padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 12px; margin: 2px; }
  .badge-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; }

  .team-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 12px; }
  .member { text-align: center; }
  .member img { width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; object-fit: cover; display: block; margin: 0 auto 6px; }
  .member .name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; }
  .member .role-tag { font-size: 11px; color: #666; margin: 2px 0; }
  .member a { font-size: 11px; color: #185FA5; text-decoration: none; }

  .stat-img { width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; }
  .contact-box { background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 14px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <div class="react-logo">RE:ACT</div>
  </div>

  <div class="wave-banner">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 860 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="wg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#667eea"/>
          <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#764ba2"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f093fb"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect width="860" height="120" fill="url(#wg)" rx="12"/>
      <path d="M0,60 Q100,20 200,60 Q300,100 400,60 Q500,20 600,60 Q700,100 800,60 L860,60 L860,120 L0,120 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"/>
      <text x="430" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Giants', sans-serif" font-size="42" fill="white" letter-spacing="3">BSSM RE:ACT</text>
    </svg>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <h3>🏫 About Us</h3>
    <ul class="info-list">
      <li><span>소속</span>부산소프트웨어마이스터고등학교</li>
      <li><span>목표</span>우리 학교만의 특별한 오류 기록 문화를 만들고, 기술적으로 성장하는 즐거움을 추구합니다.</li>
      <li><span>프로젝트</span>부마로그(Bumalogue) — BSSM 학생들을 위한 오류기록 및 공유 플랫폼</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <h3>🛠 Tech Stack</h3>
    <table class="tech">
      <tr><td>Frontend</td><td><span class="badge"><span class="badge-dot" style="background:#61DAFB"></span>React</span><span class="badge"><span class="badge-dot" style="background:#000"></span>Next.js</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td>Backend</td><td><span class="badge"><span class="badge-dot" style="background:#6DB33F"></span>Spring Boot</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td>Design</td><td><span class="badge"><span class="badge-dot" style="background:#F24E1E"></span>Figma</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td>DevOps</td><td><span class="badge"><span class="badge-dot" style="background:#2088FF"></span>GitHub Actions</span></td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <h3>👥 Our Team</h3>
    <div class="team-grid">
      <div class="member"><img src="https://github.com/gunobo.png"><div class="name">임제민</div><div class="role-tag">👑 Lead / Fullstack</div><a href="https://github.com/gunobo">@gunobo</a></div>
      <div class="member"><img src="https://github.com/carhope.png"><div class="name">차희망</div><div class="role-tag">🎨 Frontend</div><a href="https://github.com/carhope">@carhope</a></div>
      <div class="member"><img src="https://github.com/yanghyomin.png"><div class="name">양효민</div><div class="role-tag">🎨 Frontend</div><a href="https://github.com/yanghyomin">@yanghyomin</a></div>
      <div class="member"><img src="https://github.com/leehyunjae100510.png"><div class="name">이현재</div><div class="role-tag">⚙️ Backend</div><a href="https://github.com/leehyunjae100510">@leehyunjae100510</a></div>
      <div class="member"><img src="https://github.com/yunji-0504.png"><div class="name">김윤지</div><div class="role-tag">⚙️ Backend</div><a href="https://github.com/yunji-0504">@yunji-0504</a></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <h3>📊 Our Activities</h3>
    <img class="stat-img" src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=BSSM-RE-ACT&show_icons=true&theme=dark" alt="GitHub Stats">
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <h3>📫 Contact</h3>
    <div class="contact-box">✉️ &nbsp;<strong>Email:</strong> 26_51@bssm.hs.kr</div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
